URL: https://github.com/FreshRSS/FreshRSS
Language: php

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MlgmXyysd/Xiaomi-HyperOS-BootLoader-Bypass
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MlgmXyysd/Xiaomi-HyperOS-BootLoader-Bypass
Language: php
A PoC that exploits a vulnerability to bypass the Xiaomi HyperOS community restrictions of BootLoader unlocked account bindings.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PrivateBin/PrivateBin
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PrivateBin/PrivateBin
Language: php
A minimalist, open source online pastebin where the server has zero knowledge of pasted data. Data is encrypted/decrypted in the browser using 256 bits AES.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WordPress/WordPress
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WordPress/WordPress
Language: php
WordPress, Git-ified. This repository is just a mirror of the WordPress subversion repository. Please do not send pull requests. Submit pull requests to https://github.com/WordPress/wordpress-develop and patches to https://core.trac.wordpress.org/ instead.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alexjustesen/speedtest-tracker
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alexjustesen/speedtest-tracker
Language: php
Speedtest Tracker is a self-hosted application that monitors the performance and uptime of your internet connection.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: anmaped/openfang
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anmaped/openfang
Language: php
The openfang is a bootloader, kernel and toolchain for devices using Ingenic T10 and T20 SOC

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/baopham/laravel-dynamodb
Language: php

URL: https://github.com/composer/composer
Language: php

ns0:entry.ns0:title: coollabsio/coolify
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/coollabsio/coolify
Language: php
An open-source, self-hostable PaaS alternative to Vercel, Heroku & Netlify that lets you easily deploy static sites, databases, full-stack applications and 280+ one-click services on your own servers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: drupal-composer/drupal-scaffold
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/drupal-composer/drupal-scaffold
Language: php

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kimai/kimai
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kimai/kimai
Language: php
Kimai is the #1 open-source time-tracking application. From freelancers to companies and organisations - everyone can manage timesheets, generate reports, create invoices and so much more... Web-based multi-user application, available as On-Premise or SaaS version: https://www.kimai.org

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mautic/mautic
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mautic/mautic

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nextcloud/all-in-one
Language: php
📦 The official Nextcloud installation method. Provides easy deployment and maintenance with most features included in this one Nextcloud instance.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: scoumbourdis/grocery-crud
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/scoumbourdis/grocery-crud
Language: php
Grocery CRUD is a PHP Codeigniter Framework library that creates a full functional CRUD system without the requirement of extra customisation to the JavaScripts or the CSS to do it so.
